title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: A Strong Umamusume

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! It's Sweep Tosho! Sweep Tosho has
done it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's been thirty-nine years since we've had a winner from the Triple Tiara tour! Thirty-nine years!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho of the Triple Tiara tour has beaten
out the mighty competition and taken first place
at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho was incredibly, unbelievably strong!
The silence in the racecourse is deafening!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
This can't be happening... Isn't she from the... Is
this even possible?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: ...! Oh, right, applause! The race is over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap... Clap, clap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an extended silence, the crowd finally
applauds and cheers begin to echo throughout
the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't help feeling that the audience's sheer
disbelief only proves the magnitude of what
Sweep Tosho has accomplished.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haha... Come on. Just shut up about it already...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep. That was fantastic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Rob Roy. That's a pretty brief comment from
someone who loves words and books and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You can praise me some more if you like... I just
fought the ultimate hero and won, after all.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sweep... Hehe. You're right.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sorry. No matter how many thousands of
books I read, I won't be complimenting you any
more than this.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: And that's because... I'm so disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm so disappointed I don't know what to do! I
didn't want to lose that race! I wanted to win!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be the hero and plunge my blade into
the heart of the witch I so admire!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. I need to go and cool my head.
...Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Whoa. Haha. When did you learn how to sound
so cool?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But, y'know, the reason I had so much fun today is
because I was running against you. And, thanks to
you...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I pulled off my ultimate racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The changes come in dribs and drabs at first, like
ripples made by tiny drops.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
And it got me thinking. When I saw Sweep Tosho
running that day, I thought...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be surprised if more and more
Umamusume from the Triple Tiara tour started
winning all kinds of G1 races, regardless of what
year they're in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with each passing day, the ripples grow a
little bigger and spread a little further.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I wanna watch my favorite Umamusume from the
Triple Tiara tour run in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Or should I say, I wanna go see her win! I mean, it could happen, right?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
After that Takarazuka Kinen, I really think it's
possible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And finally, the ripples build into waves that wash
over the whole world.

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: And maybe—just maybe—another Umamusume on the Triple Tiara tour could...

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text:
One day, maybe they could match President
Symboli Rudolf and her seven crowns! Or even
surpass her! They could actually set a record for
G1 wins! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text:
You can't even say it's impossible anymore. It's
like the way things are has totally changed. Like
all my assumptions have been smashed up.

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's almost like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"'It was almost like we were under a magic spell,'
the spectators marveled."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Sweep Tosho has demonstrated that it doesn't
matter whether someone hails from the Triple
Crown tour or the Triple Tiara tour, because
strength is strength."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "This is undoubtedly a turning point in history."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A grin spreads across her face as she finishes
reading the article.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that, Familiar?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: They said it was like magic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sounds confident, cheerful, and unusually
innocent.
